SQLLite.SQL: SELECT NVL(CE2.MCOL_REFERENCE,'CE'||TO_CHAR(CE2.EVENT_SEQ)) AS "MCOLReference" FROM CASE_EVENTS CE1, CASE_EVENTS CE2 WHERE CE1.EVENT_SEQ = ${param.eventSeq} AND CE2.CASE_NUMBER = CE1.CASE_NUMBER AND CE2.JUDG_SEQ = CE1.JUDG_SEQ AND CE2.STD_EVENT_ID = 160 AND CE2.REQUESTER = CE1.REQUESTER AND CE2.RESULT = CE1.RESULT AND CE2.RESULT_DATE = CE1.RESULT_DATE
